/usr/bin/c++  -pthread -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/desktop-wallpaper.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/desktop-wallpaper.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/desktop-wallpaper.dir/src/decoder.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/desktop-wallpaper.dir/src/engine.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/desktop-wallpaper.dir/src/ipc_linux.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/desktop-wallpaper.dir/src/renderer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/desktop-wallpaper.dir/src/wallpaper.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/desktop-wallpaper.dir/src/monitor.cpp.o" -o wbe-lnx  -lavcodec -lavformat -lavutil -lswscale -lgtk-3 -lgdk-3 -lpangocairo-1.0 -lcairo-gobject -lgdk_pixbuf-2.0 -latk-1.0 -lpango-1.0 -lcairo -lharfbuzz -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lz /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libGLU.so -lX11 -lXrandr -lEGL -lpthread
